summary: Portfolio shows mixed signals - chief-scout remains critically broken with failing workflows while director stays completely dormant. However, strong acceleration continues across active projects with soft-power leading at 26 commits this week and language-tidbits maintaining exceptional pace at 16 commits.

soft-power.one_liner: Sustained high velocity with 26 commits this week, needs CI/CD setup

director.one_liner: Still completely stalled with zero activity for 30+ days

chief-scout.one_liner: Critical tool broken with failing workflows and declining momentum

brain-levelup.one_liner: Steady acceleration with 4 commits this week

crumble.one_liner: Dormant for 30+ days despite working CI/CD - needs decision

neutralworking.one_liner: Minimal activity with only 1 commit in 30 days

head-of-product.one_liner: Strong momentum with 11 commits this week, still has blocking TODOs
